text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 111 

PRVDR_LGL_NAME 

LABEL: Provider Legal Name 

DESCRIPTION: The name as it appears on the provider agreement between the state and the entity. Both persons 
and other entities can have a legal name, most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_LGL_NAME 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_LGL_NAME 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 150 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider
